text:
This update fixes some issues to work correctly with the dependent pymongo-1.9 port.
See http://github.com/hmarr/mongoengine/issues/issue/76 for further details.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-base.py
- files/patch-fields.py
- files/patch-queryset.py
